query: My email is isabella.lopez3271@example.com. Let me know if you need anything else!

state.history_summary:
assistant: Hi! How can I help you today?
user: The user wants to check the remaining gift card balance, identify which card was used for the most recent order, and, if allowed, switch that order to gift-card payment or otherwise to Visa.
assistant: The assistant says it can help after account verification and asks for the account email or name plus ZIP code.
user: The user provides the account email isabella.lopez3271@example.com and asks whether anything else is needed.

candidate_answers.text: Thanks — I’ll pull up your account from that email first so I can check the gift card balance and your most recent order details.
The user has now provided a direct account identifier, so the grounded next step is to resolve the user ID before looking up balances, order payment, or payment-change options.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Choose a user turn where the user has just supplied a verified account email and the assistant still needs to ground all downstream retail actions on the resolved user identity.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the visible state. Scores emphasize immediate grounded progress toward the user’s combined balance-and-payment request without assuming hidden order metadata.
notes: query is copied from the visible user message only
history_summary ends at the decision point and excludes later tool outputs such as the resolved user ID and order payment details
available_actions are restricted to the retail tool palette seen in existing manual samples
best_action is find_user_id_by_email because the provided email is the strongest visible handle for account lookup before any order or payment operation
